macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Fed Chair Powell's Term as Chair Ends May 15 Amid Criticism of Policy Errors and Persistent Inflation
items.summary: Mohamed El-Erian criticizes Jerome Powell's tenure for policy missteps, missing the 2% inflation target for six years, poor communication, and underestimating post-pandemic inflation that peaked at 9.1%; Powell will remain on the Fed Board, breaking tradition. Inflation remains structurally sticky above target, exacerbated by geopolitical tensions like strikes on Iran.

items.title: US Equities Mixed in Overnight Trading: SPY +0.04%, QQQ -0.11%, DIA +0.15%
items.summary: Major US stock indexes showed slight movements in Wednesday's overnight session amid ongoing market activity, with S&P 500 ETF up marginally while Nasdaq ETF dipped.

items.title: Federal Reserve Issues FOMC Statement on May 1
items.summary: The Federal Reserve released its latest FOMC statement on May 1, 2026, providing updates on monetary policy amid ongoing economic reviews including the 2025 framework review and Fed Listens initiative.

items.title: Key US Economic Data Releases Today: ADP Employment, PPI, Core Inflation
items.summary: Upcoming US releases include ADP Employment Change at 12:30 PM (exp. 70K), PPI MoM, Core Inflation Rate MoM (exp. 0.2%), and PPI YoY (exp. 3.6%), critical for gauging labor market and inflation trends.

items.title: Global Economic Calendar Highlights: EA PPI, US Treasury Auction, BR PMIs
items.summary: Euro Area PPI YoY at 09:00 AM (exp. 1.6%), UK Gilt Auction, German Bund Auction, Brazil S&P Global Services PMI (exp. 49), and Mexico Industrial Production among key global events today.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Ripple Teams Up with Crypto ISAC to Share North Korean Hacker Intelligence
items.summary: Ripple is distributing threat intelligence on North Korean Lazarus Group cyberattacks, including profiles of suspected IT workers, wallet addresses, and indicators of compromise, to bolster industry defenses against social engineering campaigns.

items.title: ZCash (ZEC) Price Surges Over 20% After Multicoin Capital Reveals Large Position
items.summary: ZEC jumped more than 20% following a tweet from Multicoin Capital disclosing a large position built since February, viewing it as insurance against government seizures of visible wealth.

items.title: Bitcoin Rally Stalls, Drops 1.5% to $80,800 Amid $420M Liquidations
items.summary: Bitcoin fell 1.5% to around $80,800 after stalling near $82,000, with the broader crypto market down 1.4% and over $420 million in leveraged positions liquidated.

items.title: Bitcoin Hits $82,700 on US-Iran Deal Optimism Before Slipping to $80,000
items.summary: Bitcoin surged to $82,700 amid hopes for a US-Iran deal easing energy concerns but retreated to $80,000 as doubts emerged, with analysts highlighting strong spot demand.

items.title: Crypto Market Weakens as Smart Contract Platform Index Drops Over 2%
items.summary: The overall cryptocurrency market declined, with the CoinDesk Smart Contract Platform Index falling more than 2% in the past 24 hours.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: AI Helping Ease UK's NHS Burden
items.summary: The selective use of AI in the NHS is helping free up clinicians' time by reducing the burden of basic administrative work.

items.title: Google Tests Remy AI Agent for Gemini
items.summary: Google is testing Remy, an internal Gemini AI agent designed to act for users, monitor relevant information, and learn their preferences, as focus shifts to user control.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Top DD9 Finisher OG Diamond Dave Quits Marvel Strike Force After Scopely Issues
items.summary: OG Diamond Dave, who placed seventh in Dark Dimension 9 with three diamond Annihilus characters, announced he is quitting the game due to recent Scopely disasters.

items.title: Chinese COD Supply Drops Opened in 2026 with Insane Luck
items.summary: Content creator opens free and purchased Chinese Call of Duty supply drops worth over $150 in Battle Teams 2, a game similar to COD Mobile, revealing new items and skins.

items.title: Cheaters Return Stronger in NBA 2K26
items.summary: New update highlights the return of advanced cheaters in NBA 2K26, posing challenges for fair play.

items.title: New Legendary Tekteon Fissureflesh Predicted as Top 3 in Raid Shadow Legends
items.summary: Test server footage shows the upcoming Argonite Void Legendary as a broken hybrid for PVE and PVP with support, damage, and control, potentially causing power creep.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
